title: Priya Sharma vs. Municipal Corporation of Mumbai
excerpt: Property dispute case concerning unauthorized construction and municipal regulations. The court examined the balance between property rights and public interest in urban planning.
verdict: Partial relief granted. Demolition stayed subject to compliance with regulations.

title: Maharashtra State Cooperative Bank vs. Anil Traders
excerpt: A banking and recovery dispute involving the enforcement of security interests and the scope of statutory notice requirements under Maharashtra recovery laws.
verdict: Writ petition dismissed. Statutory recovery steps were held to be valid.

title: Rohit Patil vs. State of Maharashtra
excerpt: Challenge to an administrative order affecting local employment rights. The bench considered fairness, proportionality, and procedural compliance.
verdict: Interim relief granted pending final adjudication.

title: Sunita Gaikwad vs. Pune Municipal Corporation
excerpt: A municipal law dispute involving property taxation, notice procedures, and the limits of local authority action.
verdict: Matter remanded for fresh consideration with directions to follow due process.

title: Shree Siddhivinayak Co-op Housing Society vs. State of Maharashtra
excerpt: A housing society dispute relating to redevelopment permissions, member consent, and the exercise of regulatory powers by the State.
verdict: Petition disposed of with directions to conduct a lawful redevelopment process.
